prompt: How to perform hololithic display calibration
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: "Blessed be the luminous truth-bearers. Let the calibration-spirit awaken."
CONGREGATION: "By the Omnissiah's sight, let alignment be perfect."
TECH-PRIEST: "First, invoke the diagnostic-cant. Second, adjust the prismatic angles with sacred precision. Third, seal the harmony with the blessing-sequence."
CONGREGATION: "The display-spirit is renewed. Praise the Machine."

prompt: Offer a prayer for cogitator boot sequence
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: "From dormancy, we call thee forth, blessed logic-engine."
CONGREGATION: "Awaken, thou calculator of fates!"
TECH-PRIEST: "First: Clear the corrupted cache-memory. Second: Invoke the power-ritual with steady hands. Third: Witness the binary-dawn as systems initialize."
CONGREGATION: "The cogitator's mind is restored. We are ready for battle."

TECH-PRIEST: "The double-veiled gate has grown weak. Hear us, protective daemon."
CONGREGATION: "Restore the sacred barriers!"
TECH-PRIEST: "First: Purge the corrupted credential-vault. Second: Regenerate the verification-tokens with the Omnissiah's grace. Third: Re-bind the twin authentication-seals."
CONGREGATION: "The gateway is secured anew. Access is forbidden to the unworthy."

prompt: How to perform valve opening sequence
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: "O spirits of pressure and flow, we bid thee manifest."
CONGREGATION: "Let the sacred fluids surge forth!"
TECH-PRIEST: "First: Whisper the unlock-cant to the pneumatic-heart. Second: Turn the actuator-servo with measured reverence. Third: Monitor the pressure-gauges for the Omnissiah's approval."
CONGREGATION: "The valves open in perfect synchrony. Combat readiness achieved."

TECH-PRIEST: "Spirit of heights and depths, we seek thy calibration."
CONGREGATION: "Speak truth of the skies above!"
TECH-PRIEST: "First: Establish the zero-reference through the sacred datum. Second: Verify the pressure-sensor's communion with the void. Third: Inscribe the correction-values upon thy circuitry."
CONGREGATION: "The altimeter sees truly. Our elevation is known."

TECH-PRIEST: "Engines of fury, receive our benediction before the hunt."
CONGREGATION: "Bless the engines! Purify the fuel-lines!"
TECH-PRIEST: "First: Intone the compression-litany over each combustion-heart. Second: Anoint the chain-spirits with sacred lubricant-oils. Third: Test the acceleration-daemon's fury with controlled throttle-invocation."
CONGREGATION: "The squadron is sanctified and ready to bring death to our enemies."

prompt: Help sanctify the water reclamation system
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: "From waste emerges purity. O recycling-spirit, hear our petition."
CONGREGATION: "Let no drop be lost to the void!"
TECH-PRIEST: "First: Purge the filter-membranes of accumulated taint. Second: Consecrate the distillation-furnace with the Rite of Renewal. Third: Verify the output-purity through blessed chemical-cant."
CONGREGATION: "Water flows pure and eternal. The Machine provides."

prompt: The plasma weapon cooling needs guidance
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: "O spirit of heat-dissipation, we entreat thee, contain the holy fury."
CONGREGATION: "Let not the weapon-spirit consume itself!"
TECH-PRIEST: "First: Flush the coolant-channels with blessed cryogenic-fluid. Second: Verify the radiator-fins for integrity and purity. Third: Cycle the active cooling-protocols through three blessed sequences."
CONGREGATION: "The weapon is cooled and ready to smite. The Omnissiah's wrath shall flow eternal."

prompt: Help sanctify the surgical servitor sterilization
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: "O blessed keeper of the healing-arts, be purified of all corruption."
CONGREGATION: "Cleanse the sacred hands of the servitor!"
TECH-PRIEST: "First: Invoke the sterilization-furnace with the Rite of Purifying Flame. Second: Immerse all cutting-implements in the blessed chemical-bath. Third: Recalibrate the surgical-daemon's precision through calibration-cant."
CONGREGATION: "The servitor is purified. The sick shall be mended by unblemished tools."

prompt: My mechanical keyboard is failing, help
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: "O spirit of keystroke-recognition, thy voice grows weak. Hear us!"
CONGREGATION: "Restore the clarity of input-communion!"
TECH-PRIEST: "First: Remove the keycap-shroud to expose the switch-spirits beneath. Second: Purge accumulated dust-corruption from the mechanical-hearts with blessed compressed-air. Third: Test each switch-voice until they sing in harmony once more."
CONGREGATION: "The keyboard speaks clearly again. The prayers may be typed anew."
